    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Serialisierte Form

    D

    delete(Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.DeviceResource
    Removes a device from a room (FR-05).
    delete(Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.RoomResource
    Deletes a room and all its devices (FR-03).
    delete(Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.RuleResource
    Deletes a rule.
    delete(Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.SceneResource
    Deletes a scene.
    delete(Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.ScheduleResource
    Deletes a schedule.
    delete(Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.UserResource
    Deletes a user account and all associated data.
    delete(Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.VacationModeResource
    Deletes a vacation mode configuration.
    description - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ActivityLogResponse
    Human-readable description of the action.
    description - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.ActivityLog
    Human-readable description of the action taken.
    device - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.ActivityLog
    The device whose state changed.
    device - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.EnergyLog
    The device this consumption record belongs to.
    device - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.SceneDeviceState
    The device whose state should be set when the scene is activated.
    device - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Schedule
    The device this schedule acts on.
    device() - Methode in Datensatzklasse at.jku.se.websocket.DeviceEventBroadcaster.DeviceStateMessage
    Gibt den Wert für die Datensatzkomponente device zurück.
    Device - Klasse in at.jku.se.entity
    A virtual smart-home device of a specific type located in a room (FR-04).
    Device() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Device
    Creates an empty entity; fields are populated before persisting.
    DeviceCommand - Datensatzklasse in at.jku.se.iot
    Command dispatched to an IoT protocol adapter to change a device's state.
    DeviceCommand(Long, String, Map) - Konstruktor für Datensatzklasse at.jku.se.iot.DeviceCommand
    Erstellt eine Instanz einer Datensatzklasse DeviceCommand.
    DeviceCreateRequest - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.request
    Request body for adding a new virtual device to a room (FR-04).
    DeviceCreateRequest() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.DeviceCreateRequest
    Creates an empty request; fields are populated during deserialization.
    DeviceEnergySummary() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.EnergyDashboardResponse.DeviceEnergySummary
    Creates an empty per-device summary; fields are populated by the service layer.
    DeviceEvent - Datensatzklasse in at.jku.se.iot
    Event emitted by an IoT protocol adapter reporting a device-side change.
    DeviceEvent(String, String, Map, LocalDateTime) - Konstruktor für Datensatzklasse at.jku.se.iot.DeviceEvent
    Erstellt eine Instanz einer Datensatzklasse DeviceEvent.
    DeviceEventBroadcaster - Klasse in at.jku.se.websocket
    Broadcasts device state changes to all connected WebSocket clients (FR-07).
    DeviceEventBroadcaster() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.websocket.DeviceEventBroadcaster
    Creates the broadcaster; intended for CDI instantiation.
    DeviceEventBroadcaster.DeviceStateMessage - Datensatzklasse in at.jku.se.websocket
    Message wrapper sent to WebSocket clients.
    deviceId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.EnergyLogRequest
    Identifier of the device the entry applies to.
    deviceId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.SceneDeviceStateRequest
    Identifier of the target device.
    deviceId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.ScheduleRequest
    Identifier of the target device.
    deviceId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ActivityLogResponse
    Identifier of the device the action was performed on.
    deviceId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ConflictResponse
    ID of the device both automations target.
    deviceId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.EnergyDashboardResponse.DeviceEnergySummary
    Identifier of the device.
    deviceId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.EnergyLogResponse
    Identifier of the device the entry belongs to.
    deviceId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.SceneDeviceStateResponse
    Identifier of the target device.
    deviceId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ScheduleResponse
    Identifier of the target device.
    deviceId() - Methode in Datensatzklasse at.jku.se.iot.DeviceCommand
    Gibt den Wert für die Datensatzkomponente deviceId zurück.
    DeviceMapper - Klasse in at.jku.se.mapper
    Maps Device entities to response DTOs.
    deviceName - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ActivityLogResponse
    Human-readable name of the device at the time of the action.
    deviceName - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ConflictResponse
    Name of the device both automations target.
    deviceName - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.EnergyDashboardResponse.DeviceEnergySummary
    Display name of the device.
    deviceName - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.EnergyLogResponse
    Display name of the device at the time of recording.
    deviceName - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.SceneDeviceStateResponse
    Display name of the target device.
    deviceName - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ScheduleResponse
    Human-readable name of the target device.
    DeviceRenameRequest - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.request
    Request body for renaming an existing device (FR-05).
    DeviceRenameRequest() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.DeviceRenameRequest
    Creates an empty request; fields are populated during deserialization.
    DeviceRepository - Klasse in at.jku.se.repository
    Repository for Device entities.
    DeviceRepository() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.repository.DeviceRepository
    Creates the repository; intended for CDI instantiation.
    DeviceResource - Klasse in at.jku.se.resource
    REST resource for device management (FR-04, FR-05, FR-06, FR-07).
    DeviceResource() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.resource.DeviceResource
    Creates the resource; intended for CDI instantiation.
    DeviceResponse - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.response
    Response DTO for a device including its current state (FR-07).
    DeviceResponse() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.DeviceResponse
    Creates an empty response; fields are populated by the mapping layer.
    devices - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Room
    Devices installed in this room.
    DeviceStateMessage(String, DeviceResponse) - Konstruktor für Datensatzklasse at.jku.se.websocket.DeviceEventBroadcaster.DeviceStateMessage
    Erstellt eine Instanz einer Datensatzklasse DeviceStateMessage.
    DeviceStateRequest - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.request
    Request body for manually controlling a device's state (FR-06).
    DeviceStateRequest() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.DeviceStateRequest
    Creates an empty request; fields are populated during deserialization.
    deviceStates - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.SceneRequest
    Device target states that make up the scene.
    deviceStates - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.SceneResponse
    Target device states that make up the scene.
    deviceStates - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Scene
    The individual device target states that make up this scene.
    DeviceStateSocket - Klasse in at.jku.se.websocket
    WebSocket endpoint for real-time device state updates (FR-07).
    DeviceStateSocket() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.websocket.DeviceStateSocket
    Creates the socket endpoint; intended for CDI instantiation.
    DeviceType - Enum-Klasse in at.jku.se.entity.enums
    Supported virtual smart device types.
    DIMMER - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse at.jku.se.entity.enums.DeviceType
    Dimmable light.
    disconnect() - Methode in Schnittstelle at.jku.se.iot.IoTProtocol
    Closes the connection and releases any associated resources.
    disconnect() - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.iot.MockProtocolAdapter
     
    disconnect() - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.iot.MqttProtocolAdapter
